response.justification: The candidate has nearly two decades of software engineering experience, significantly exceeding the 6+ years requirement. His recent work heavily features the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, MongoDB) and directly satisfies the niche requirement for AI-agent development, complemented by a strong background in testing methodologies and secondary Java experience.
strengths: Deep expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud/containerization
Directly relevant recent experience with AI agent infrastructure and MCP
Strong fundamentals in testing (TDD) and secondary language experience (Java)
concerns: May be overqualified (Staff/Founder level) for a Mid-Senior IC position
Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, despite a strong Node.js and testing background
History of relatively short tenures (1-2 years) across several past roles
